title: M5 breaks with huge SQL query.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE customers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO customers (name, email) VALUES ('John Doe', 'john.doe@example.com');
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, customer_id INT, total_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id));
SELECT c.name, o.total_amount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > 50.00;
key_bug_features: Huge SQL query causes M5 to break
